ground_truth.title: CDs | The Mindfulness Meditation Institute
ground_truth.main_content: The Mindfulness Meditation Institute offers guided meditation audio CDs to help practitioners develop their mindfulness meditation practice. Available CDs include: Inner Silence: Guided Relaxation Meditations for Inner Peace and Restful Sleep ($9.99) - Features powerful relaxation techniques to quickly calm body and mind, gently guiding users into deep relaxation to overcome stress and anxiety. Also available on Amazon.com for international orders. Quick Start to Mindfulness Meditation ($9.99) - Provides clear and simple instructions on the mindfulness meditation practice with easy-to-follow guided meditations. Also available in mp3 format.
with: Having trouble with stress, or sleeping at night? Then you'll love the peaceful meditations of the Inner Silence CD.
The Quick Start to Mindfulness Meditation CD gives you clear and simple instructions of the mindfulness meditation practice.
They use powerful relaxation techniques that will quickly calm your body and mind.
For international orders, please visit Amazon.com.
